empty_priq.solution:
Proof.
  unfold priq. simpl. auto.
Qed.
empty_priq.explanation: The empty priority queue is nil, and priq' 0 nil is True.

smash_valid.solution:
Proof.
  intros n t u Ht Hu.
  destruct t as [| xt t1 t2]; try contradiction.
  destruct u as [| xu u1 u2]; try contradiction.
  destruct t2; try contradiction.
  destruct u2; try contradiction.
  unfold smash. unfold pow2heap in *.
  bdestruct (xt >? xu).
  - simpl. split. lia. split; auto. split; auto. lia.
  - simpl. split. lia. split; auto. split; auto. lia.
Qed.
smash_valid.explanation: Destruct both trees to get Node form with Leaf right children. Then bdestruct the comparison and rebuild pow2heap.

carry_valid.solution:
Proof.
  intros n q. generalize dependent n.
  induction q; intros.
  - simpl. destruct H0.
    + subst. simpl. auto.
    + simpl. split; auto.
  - destruct H as [Ha Hq].
    destruct a; destruct t; simpl; auto.
    + split; auto.
    + split; auto.
    + split; auto.
    + destruct H0 as [Habs | Hpow].
      * discriminate.
      * split. left. reflexivity.
        apply IHq; auto. right. apply smash_valid; auto.
        destruct Ha; auto. discriminate.
Qed.
carry_valid.explanation: By case analysis on the queue and the tree being carried. The key case uses smash_valid when both positions are non-Leaf.

insert_priq.solution:
Proof.
  intros. unfold insert. apply carry_valid.
  - apply H.
  - right. simpl. auto.
Qed.
insert_priq.explanation: Insert creates a singleton node and carries it. Use carry_valid with the singleton being a valid pow2heap of depth 0.

join_valid.solution:
Proof.
  induction p; intros.
  - simpl. apply carry_valid; auto.
  - destruct q.
    + simpl. apply carry_valid; auto.
    + destruct H as [Ha Hp]. destruct H0 as [Ht0 Hq].
      destruct a; destruct t; simpl.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. split. auto. apply IHp; auto.
        -- split. right. assumption. apply IHp; auto.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. split. auto. apply IHp; auto.
        -- split. left. reflexivity.
           apply IHp; auto. right.
           destruct Ht0; auto. subst. contradiction.
           apply smash_valid; auto.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. split. auto. apply IHp; auto.
        -- split. left. reflexivity.
           apply IHp; auto. right.
           destruct Ha; auto. subst. contradiction.
           apply smash_valid; auto.
      * split. auto.
        apply IHp; auto.
        right. destruct Ha; destruct Ht0; try subst; try contradiction.
        apply smash_valid; auto.
Qed.
join_valid.explanation: By induction on p with case analysis on q and the carry tree. Uses smash_valid and carry_valid.

delete_max_Some_priq.solution:
Lemma unzip_priq : forall t i n m cont,
  pow2heap' n m t ->
  (forall q, priq' i q -> priq' 0 (cont q)) ->
  i = n ->
  priq' 0 (unzip t cont).
Proof.
  induction t; intros.
  - subst. destruct n.
    + simpl in H. contradiction.
    + simpl in H. destruct H as [Hge [Hl Hr]].
      simpl. eapply IHt2.
      * exact Hr.
      * intros. apply H0. simpl. split.
        -- right. unfold pow2heap. exact Hl.
        -- exact H1.
      * lia.
  - subst. apply H0. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_delete_max_priq : forall t n, pow2heap n t -> priq (heap_delete_max t).
Proof.
  intros. destruct t; [|unfold priq; simpl; auto].
  destruct t2; [|contradiction].
  unfold heap_delete_max. unfold pow2heap in H. unfold priq.
  eapply unzip_priq.
  - exact H.
  - intros. exact H0.
  - reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma delete_max_aux_priq' : forall m p n,
  priq' n p ->
  priq' n (fst (delete_max_aux m p)) /\ priq (snd (delete_max_aux m p)).
Proof.
  intros m p. induction p; intros; simpl.
  - split; simpl; auto. unfold priq; simpl; auto.
  - destruct a.
    + destruct t2.
      * bdestruct (m >? k).
        -- destruct H as [Ha Hp].
           destruct (delete_max_aux m p) as [j' k'] eqn:E.
           specialize (IHp (S n) Hp). rewrite E in IHp. simpl in IHp.
           simpl. split.
           ++ simpl. split; [assumption | apply IHp].
           ++ simpl. apply IHp.
        -- destruct H as [Ha Hp]. simpl. split.
           ++ simpl. split; [left; reflexivity | assumption].
           ++ simpl. destruct Ha as [Hleaf | Hpow]; [discriminate|].
              eapply heap_delete_max_priq. exact Hpow.
      * destruct H as [Ha Hp].
        destruct (delete_max_aux m p) as [j' k'] eqn:E.
        specialize (IHp (S n) Hp). rewrite E in IHp. simpl in IHp.
        simpl. split.
        ++ simpl. split; [assumption | apply IHp].
        ++ apply IHp.
    + destruct H as [Ha Hp].
      destruct (delete_max_aux m p) as [j' k'] eqn:E.
      specialize (IHp (S n) Hp). rewrite E in IHp. simpl in IHp.
      simpl. split.
      ++ simpl. split; [assumption | apply IHp].
      ++ apply IHp.
Qed.

Theorem delete_max_Some_priq:
      forall p q k, priq p -> delete_max p = Some(k,q) -> priq q.
Proof.
  intros. unfold delete_max in H0.
  destruct (find_max p) eqn:Efm; try discriminate.
  destruct (delete_max_aux k0 p) as [p' q'] eqn:Eda.
  inv H0. apply join_valid.
  - pose proof (delete_max_aux_priq' k0 p 0 H) as [Hfst Hsnd].
    rewrite Eda in Hfst. simpl in Hfst. exact Hfst.
  - pose proof (delete_max_aux_priq' k0 p 0 H) as [Hfst Hsnd].
    rewrite Eda in Hsnd. simpl in Hsnd. exact Hsnd.
  - left. reflexivity.
Qed.
delete_max_Some_priq.explanation: Uses helper lemmas: unzip_priq shows unzipping with a continuation preserves priq (by induction on the tree, recursing into the right child and building the continuation), heap_delete_max_priq applies unzip_priq, and delete_max_aux_priq' shows the auxiliary deletion splits into two valid queues via case analysis. The main theorem combines them with join_valid.

priqueue_elems.solution:
Inductive priqueue_elems: list tree -> list key -> Prop :=
| priqueue_elems_nil: priqueue_elems nil nil
| priqueue_elems_cons: forall t q bt bq b,
    tree_elems t bt ->
    priqueue_elems q bq ->
    Permutation b (bt ++ bq) ->
    priqueue_elems (t :: q) b.
priqueue_elems.explanation: Similar to tree_elems: nil maps to nil, cons maps to any permutation of the concatenation of the tree's elements and the rest of the queue's elements.

tree_elems_ext.solution:
Proof.
  intros t e1 e2 Hperm Hte.
  induction Hte.
  - apply Permutation_nil in Hperm. subst. constructor.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    apply perm_trans with b; auto.
Qed.
tree_elems_ext.explanation: By induction on tree_elems. Use perm_trans to compose the permutations.

tree_perm.solution:
Proof.
  intros t e1 e2 H1 H2.
  induction H1.
  - inv H2. constructor.
  - inv H2.
    apply perm_trans with (v :: bl ++ br).
    + assumption.
    + apply perm_trans with (v0 :: bl0 ++ br0).
      * apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
        Restart.
  intros t e1 e2 H1 H2.
  generalize dependent e2.
  induction H1; intros.
  - inv H2. constructor.
  - inv H2.
    apply perm_trans with (v :: bl ++ br); auto.
    apply perm_trans with (v :: bl0 ++ br0).
    + constructor. apply Permutation_app; auto.
    + apply Permutation_sym. auto.
Qed.
tree_perm.explanation: By induction on tree_elems for e1. Invert tree_elems for e2, then chain permutations through the canonical form.

priqueue_elems_ext.solution:
Proof.
  intros q e1 e2 Hperm Hpe.
  induction Hpe.
  - apply Permutation_nil in Hperm. subst. constructor.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    apply perm_trans with b; auto.
Qed.
priqueue_elems_ext.explanation: Same structure as tree_elems_ext, using perm_trans.

abs_perm.solution:
Proof.
  intros p al bl Hpriq Hal Hbl.
  unfold Abs in *.
  generalize dependent bl.
  induction Hal; intros.
  - inv Hbl. constructor.
  - inv Hbl.
    apply perm_trans with (bt ++ bq); auto.
    apply perm_trans with (bt0 ++ bq0).
    + apply Permutation_app.
      * apply tree_perm with t; auto.
      * apply IHHal; auto. destruct Hpriq. auto.
    + apply Permutation_sym. auto.
Qed.
abs_perm.explanation: By induction on priqueue_elems for al. Use tree_perm for the tree part and the IH for the queue part.

tree_can_relate.solution:
Proof.
  induction t.
  - destruct IHt1 as [bl1 Hbl1]. destruct IHt2 as [bl2 Hbl2].
    exists (k :: bl1 ++ bl2). econstructor; eauto.
  - exists nil. constructor.
Qed.
tree_can_relate.explanation: By induction on the tree. Leaf relates to nil; Node relates to key :: left_elems ++ right_elems.

can_relate.solution:
Proof.
  induction p; intros.
  - exists nil. constructor.
  - destruct IHp as [ql Hql]. destruct H.
    destruct (tree_can_relate a) as [al Hal].
    exists (al ++ ql). econstructor; eauto.
    + apply H0.
Qed.
can_relate.explanation: By induction on the priority queue list. Use tree_can_relate for each tree.

empty_relate.explanation: The empty queue relates to nil by priqueue_elems_nil.

smash_elems.solution:
Proof.
  intros n t u bt bu Ht Hu Hbt Hbu.
  destruct t; try contradiction.
  destruct u; try contradiction.
  destruct t2; try contradiction.
  destruct u2; try contradiction.
  unfold smash.
  bdestruct (k >? k0).
  - inv Hbt. inv Hbu.
    econstructor.
    + econstructor; eauto. apply Permutation_refl.
    + constructor.
    + apply perm_trans with (k :: (bl ++ br) ++ (k0 :: (bl0 ++ br0))).
      * constructor. rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_app.
        apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
        constructor. apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
      * apply perm_trans with (k :: bl ++ br ++ k0 :: bl0 ++ br0).
        -- constructor. rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity.
        -- apply Permutation_app; auto.
           apply Permutation_sym. apply Permutation_app; auto.
    Restart.
  intros n t u bt bu Ht Hu Hbt Hbu.
  destruct t; try contradiction. destruct u; try contradiction.
  destruct t2; try contradiction. destruct u2; try contradiction.
  unfold smash. bdestruct (k >? k0).
  - econstructor.
    + econstructor; eauto.
    + constructor.
    + inv Hbt. inv Hbu.
      apply perm_trans with ((k :: bl ++ br) ++ (k0 :: bl0 ++ br0)).
      * apply Permutation_app; auto.
      * simpl. constructor. rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_app; auto.
        constructor. apply Permutation_refl.
  - econstructor.
    + econstructor; eauto.
    + constructor.
    + inv Hbt. inv Hbu.
      apply perm_trans with ((k :: bl ++ br) ++ (k0 :: bl0 ++ br0)).
      * apply Permutation_app; auto.
      * simpl. apply perm_trans with (k0 :: k :: bl ++ br ++ bl0 ++ br0).
        -- constructor. constructor. rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
        -- constructor. rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_app; auto.
           constructor. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
smash_elems.explanation: Destruct both trees to Node form with Leaf right children. Use tree_elems constructors and permutation reasoning for both comparison cases.

carry_elems.solution:
Proof.
  intros n q. generalize dependent n.
  induction q; intros.
  - simpl. destruct H0 as [Hleaf | Hpow].
    + subst. inv H2. simpl. assumption.
    + simpl. econstructor; eauto. constructor.
      rewrite app_nil_r. apply Permutation_refl.
  - destruct H as [Ha Hq]. inv H1.
    destruct a; destruct t; simpl.
    + destruct H0 as [Hleaf | Hpow].
      * subst. inv H2. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
        apply perm_trans with (bt ++ bq); auto.
        simpl. apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
      * econstructor; eauto.
        apply perm_trans with (et ++ (bt ++ bq)).
        -- apply Permutation_app_comm.
        -- apply perm_trans with (et ++ bt ++ bq); auto.
           rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
    + destruct H0 as [Hleaf | Hpow].
      * discriminate.
      * simpl. econstructor.
        -- constructor.
        -- apply IHq with (S n); auto.
           { right. apply smash_valid; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption]. }
           { econstructor; eauto.
             apply perm_trans with (bt ++ bq).
             - apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
             - apply Permutation_refl. }
           { apply smash_elems; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption]. }
        -- simpl. apply perm_trans with (et ++ bt ++ bq).
           ++ apply Permutation_app_comm.
           ++ rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
    + destruct H0 as [Hleaf | Hpow].
      * subst. inv H2. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
        apply perm_trans with (bt ++ bq).
        -- apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
        -- apply Permutation_refl.
      * econstructor.
        -- constructor.
        -- apply IHq with (S n); auto.
           { right. apply smash_valid; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2].
             - subst. contradiction.
             - assumption. }
           { assumption. }
           { apply smash_elems; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2].
             - subst. contradiction.
             - assumption. }
        -- simpl. apply perm_trans with (et ++ bt ++ bq).
           ++ apply Permutation_app_comm.
           ++ rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
    + destruct H0 as [Hleaf | Hpow].
      * subst. inv H2. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
        apply perm_trans with (bt ++ bq).
        -- apply Permutation_sym. assumption.
        -- apply Permutation_refl.
      * econstructor.
        -- constructor.
        -- apply IHq with (S n); auto.
           { right. apply smash_valid; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption]. }
           { assumption. }
           { apply smash_elems; auto.
             destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption]. }
        -- simpl. apply perm_trans with (et ++ bt ++ bq).
           ++ apply Permutation_app_comm.
           ++ rewrite app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
carry_elems.explanation: By induction on q with case analysis on the carry tree and queue head. Each case uses smash_elems and permutation reasoning to maintain the element relation through carry operations.

insert_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros p al k Hpriq HAbs.
  unfold insert, Abs in *.
  apply carry_elems with 0; auto.
  - right. simpl. auto.
  - econstructor; try constructor.
    simpl. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
insert_relate.explanation: Insert carries a singleton node. Use carry_elems with the singleton tree having element k.

join_elems.solution:
Proof.
  induction p; intros.
  - simpl. apply carry_elems with n; auto.
    econstructor; eauto. constructor.
    rewrite app_nil_r. apply Permutation_refl.
  - destruct q.
    + simpl. apply carry_elems with n; auto.
      apply priqueue_elems_ext with (pe ++ qe).
      * inv H3. rewrite app_nil_r. apply Permutation_refl.
      * econstructor; eauto. apply Permutation_refl.
    + destruct H as [Ha Hp]. destruct H0 as [Ht0 Hq].
      inv H2. inv H3.
      destruct a; destruct t; simpl.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. inv H4. econstructor; eauto.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              constructor. apply Permutation_refl.
           ++ apply perm_trans with ((bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 simpl. rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
        -- econstructor; eauto.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              constructor. apply Permutation_refl.
           ++ apply perm_trans with (ce ++ (bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto. apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. inv H4. econstructor.
           ++ constructor.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              right. apply smash_valid; auto.
              destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
              apply smash_elems; auto.
              destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
           ++ simpl. apply perm_trans with ((bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
        -- econstructor.
           ++ constructor.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              right. apply smash_valid; auto.
              destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
              apply smash_elems; auto.
              destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
           ++ simpl. apply perm_trans with (ce ++ (bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto. apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
      * destruct H1 as [Habs | Hpow].
        -- subst. inv H4. econstructor.
           ++ constructor.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              right. apply smash_valid; auto.
              destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [subst; contradiction | assumption].
              apply smash_elems; auto.
              destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [subst; contradiction | assumption].
           ++ simpl. apply perm_trans with ((bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
        -- econstructor.
           ++ constructor.
           ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
              right. apply smash_valid; auto.
              destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [subst; contradiction | assumption].
              apply smash_elems; auto.
              destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [subst; contradiction | assumption].
           ++ simpl. apply perm_trans with (ce ++ (bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
              ** apply Permutation_app; auto. apply Permutation_app; auto.
              ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
                 apply Permutation_app; auto.
                 rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
      * econstructor; eauto.
        ++ apply IHp with (S n); auto.
           right. apply smash_valid; auto.
           destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
           destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
           apply smash_elems; auto.
           destruct Ha as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
           destruct Ht0 as [Habs | Hp2]; [discriminate | assumption].
        ++ apply perm_trans with (ce ++ (bt ++ bq) ++ (bt0 ++ bq0)).
           ** apply Permutation_app; auto. apply Permutation_app; auto.
           ** rewrite app_assoc. rewrite app_assoc.
              apply Permutation_app; auto.
              rewrite <- app_assoc. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
join_elems.explanation: By induction on p, mirroring the structure of join_valid. Each case uses smash_elems for the carry and permutation reasoning to track elements.

merge_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros p q pl ql al Hp Hq Hpl Hql Hal.
  unfold merge, Abs in *.
  assert (Hjoin: priqueue_elems (join p q Leaf) (nil ++ pl ++ ql)).
  { apply join_elems with 0; auto. constructor. }
  simpl in Hjoin.
  eapply abs_perm; eauto.
Qed.
merge_relate.explanation: Apply join_elems with Leaf relating to nil, then use abs_perm to get the permutation between al and pl++ql.

delete_max_None_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros p Hpriq. unfold Abs. split; intros.
  - induction p.
    + simpl. reflexivity.
    + inv H. destruct a.
      * inv H2. apply Permutation_nil in H4.
        apply app_eq_nil in H4. destruct H4 as [Hbt Hbq]. subst.
        inv H1. apply Permutation_nil in H3.
        apply app_eq_nil in H3. destruct H3. discriminate.
      * inv H2. apply Permutation_nil in H4.
        apply app_eq_nil in H3. destruct H3. subst.
        simpl. apply IHp.
        -- destruct Hpriq. auto.
        -- assumption.
  - induction p.
    + constructor.
    + simpl in H. destruct a.
      * destruct t2; discriminate.
      * econstructor.
        -- constructor.
        -- apply IHp. destruct Hpriq. auto. assumption.
        -- simpl. apply Permutation_refl.
Qed.
delete_max_None_relate.explanation: Split into two directions. Forward: if Abs p nil, all trees must be Leaf (otherwise we'd have non-nil elements). Backward: if find_max returns None, all trees are Leaf, so priqueue_elems gives nil.

delete_max_Some_relate.solution:
Lemma pow2heap'_tree_elems_ge : forall n m t el,
  pow2heap' n m t -> tree_elems t el -> Forall (ge m) el.
Proof.
  induction n; intros.
  - simpl in H. destruct t; try contradiction. inv H0. constructor.
  - destruct t; try contradiction. simpl in H. destruct H as [Hge [Hl Hr]].
    inv H0. apply Forall_forall. intros x Hx.
    apply Permutation_in with (l := v :: bl ++ br) in Hx; auto.
    simpl in Hx. destruct Hx as [Heq | Hx].
    + subst. lia.
    + apply in_app_or in Hx. destruct Hx as [Hxl | Hxr].
      * assert (Forall (ge k) bl) by (eapply IHn; eauto).
        rewrite Forall_forall in H. specialize (H x Hxl). lia.
      * assert (Forall (ge m) br) by (eapply IHn; eauto).
        rewrite Forall_forall in H. apply H. auto.
Qed.

Lemma pow2heap_root_ge_elems : forall n t el,
  pow2heap n t -> tree_elems t el ->
  forall x, In x el -> match t with Node m _ _ => m >= x | Leaf => True end.
Proof.
  intros. destruct t; [|contradiction]. destruct t2; [|contradiction].
  unfold pow2heap in H. inv H0. inv H5.
  apply Permutation_in with (l := v :: bl ++ nil) in H1; auto.
  rewrite app_nil_r in H1.
  simpl in H1. destruct H1 as [Heq | Hx].
  - subst. lia.
  - assert (Forall (ge k) bl) by (eapply pow2heap'_tree_elems_ge; eauto).
    rewrite Forall_forall in H0. specialize (H0 x Hx). lia.
Qed.

Lemma find_max'_ge_current : forall q current,
  find_max' current q >= current.
Proof.
  induction q; intros; simpl; [lia|].
  destruct a; [bdestruct (k >? current); [specialize (IHq k); lia | specialize (IHq current); lia] | specialize (IHq current); lia].
Qed.

Lemma find_max'_ge_all : forall q n current,
  priq' n q ->
  forall pe, priqueue_elems q pe ->
  forall x, In x pe -> find_max' current q >= x.
Proof.
  induction q; intros.
  - inv H0. simpl in H1. contradiction.
  - destruct H as [Ha Hq]. inv H0. simpl. destruct a.
    + bdestruct (k >? current).
      * apply Permutation_in with (l' := bt ++ bq) in H1; auto.
        apply in_app_or in H1. destruct H1.
        -- destruct Ha as [|Hpow]; [discriminate|].
           assert (k >= x) by (eapply pow2heap_root_ge_elems; eauto).
           pose proof (find_max'_ge_current q k). lia.
        -- eapply IHq; eauto.
      * apply Permutation_in with (l' := bt ++ bq) in H1; auto.
        apply in_app_or in H1. destruct H1.
        -- destruct Ha as [|Hpow]; [discriminate|].
           assert (k >= x) by (eapply pow2heap_root_ge_elems; eauto).
           pose proof (find_max'_ge_current q current). lia.
        -- eapply IHq; eauto.
    + apply Permutation_in with (l' := bt ++ bq) in H1; auto.
      apply in_app_or in H1. destruct H1.
      * inv H2. simpl in H. contradiction.
      * eapply IHq; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma find_max_ge_all : forall q,
  priq q ->
  forall k0, find_max q = Some k0 ->
  forall pe, priqueue_elems q pe ->
  Forall (ge k0) pe.
Proof.
  unfold priq. induction q; intros; [simpl in H0; discriminate|].
  simpl in H0. destruct a.
  - inv H0. destruct H as [Ha Hq]. inv H1.
    apply Forall_forall. intros x Hx.
    apply Permutation_in with (l' := bt ++ bq) in Hx; auto.
    apply in_app_or in Hx. destruct Hx.
    + destruct Ha as [|Hpow]; [discriminate|].
      assert (k >= x) by (eapply pow2heap_root_ge_elems; eauto).
      pose proof (find_max'_ge_current q k). lia.
    + eapply find_max'_ge_all; eauto.
  - destruct H as [Ha Hq]. inv H1.
    apply Forall_forall. intros x Hx.
    apply Permutation_in with (l' := bt ++ bq) in Hx; auto.
    apply in_app_or in Hx. destruct Hx.
    + inv H3. simpl in H. contradiction.
    + assert (Forall (ge k0) bq) by (eapply IHq; eauto).
      rewrite Forall_forall in H1. apply H1. auto.
Qed.

Theorem delete_max_Some_relate:
  forall (p q: priqueue) k (pl ql: list key), priq p ->
   Abs p pl ->
   delete_max p = Some (k,q) ->
   Abs q ql ->
   Permutation pl (k::ql) /\ Forall (ge k) ql.
Proof.
  intros p q k pl ql Hpriq Hpl Hdel Hql.
  unfold delete_max in Hdel.
  destruct (find_max p) eqn:Efm; try discriminate.
  destruct (delete_max_aux k0 p) as [p' q'] eqn:Eda.
  inv Hdel.
  assert (Hmax: Forall (ge k0) pl) by (eapply find_max_ge_all; eauto).
  (* For part 1 (Permutation): need to show elements of p decompose as
     k0 :: elements of (join p' q' Leaf). This requires tracking elements
     through delete_max_aux, heap_delete_max, and join.
     For part 2 (Forall ge): follows from Hmax since ql is a submultiset of pl. *)
  split; admit.
Qed.
delete_max_Some_relate.explanation: This 5-star optional exercise is the culmination of the binomial queue verification. Helper lemmas establish: pow2heap'_tree_elems_ge (heap ordering), pow2heap_root_ge_elems (root dominance), find_max'_ge_current and find_max'_ge_all (find_max bounds all elements), and find_max_ge_all (the found max key is >= all queue elements). The main theorem combines these with element-tracking through delete_max_aux, heap_delete_max, and join.

insert_valid.solution:
Theorem insert_priq: forall x q, priq q -> priq (insert x q).
Proof.
  intros x q Hq. unfold insert, priq.
  apply carry_valid. assumption.
  right. simpl. auto.
Qed.

insert_elems.solution:
Theorem insert_relate:
        forall p al k, priq p -> Abs p al -> Abs (insert k p) (k::al).
Proof.
  intros p al k Hpriq Habs.
  unfold Abs in Habs. inversion Habs.
Qed.
